title: Sanity Document Structure
description: Structure documentation for Sanity Content Lake documents

fields.name: _id
fields.description: Unique document identifier. Draft documents are prefixed with 'drafts.'

fields.name: _type
fields.description: Schema type identifier mapping to a Sanity schema definition

fields.name: _rev
fields.description: Revision ID, updated with each mutation for optimistic concurrency

fields.name: _createdAt
fields.description: UTC timestamp when the document was created

fields.name: _updatedAt
fields.description: UTC timestamp when the document was last modified

notes: Additional fields are document-type-specific and defined in the Sanity Studio schema.
